records.ety: [OE. fewe, feawe, AS. fe, pl. fewe; akin to OS. fāh, OHG. fō fao, Icel. fār, Sw. f, pl., Dan. faa, pl., Goth. faus, L. paucus, cf. Gr. pay^ros. Cf. Paucity.]

defs: Not many; small, limited, or confined in number; -- indicating a small portion of units or individuals constituting a whole; often, by ellipsis of a noun, a few people.
notes: ☞ Few is often used partitively; as, few of them.
